payload.label: shelf
payload.long_description: Partial white-painted wooden mantel-style shelf visible above a black fireplace surround with decorative recessed panels and curved vertical moulding; right/top of the shelf is edge-cropped and sits next to a grey curtain, approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"shelf","short_description":"white painted mantel shelf edge","long_description":"Partial white-painted wooden mantel-style shelf visible above a black fireplace surround with decorative recessed panels and curved vertical moulding; right/top of the shelf is edge-cropped and sits next to a grey curtain, approximately 0.8 m from the camera.","attributes":["white paint","wooden material","decorative recessed panels","curved vertical moulding","edge-cropped / partial","adjacent grey curtain","black fireplace surround","matte painted finish"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
